title: Emotion Voice Game
description: Pick a feeling, hear a theatrical model, and perform the same little line with a happy, scared, proud, sleepy, or animal voice.
learningGoals: Recognize feelings from facial and vocal cues
Change pitch, pace, volume, and rhythm to express emotion
Build confidence performing short spoken lines
interactionModel: listen to a line prompt, tap an emotion or animal sticker, hear the modeled performance, and copy it aloud
feedbackModel: Every emotion is a valid performance choice; the coach models it broadly, the sticker sparkles into the journal, and the show ends with warm applause.

modes.title: Say It With Feeling
modes.skill: expressing the same sentence with different emotions

modes.title: Animal Feelings
modes.skill: recognizing and copying characterful emotional voices
